# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - release/*
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: read
    outputs:
      artifact-name: ${{ steps.set-artifact-name.outputs.artifact-name }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '18'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test

      - name: Build artifacts
        run: npm run build

      - name: Set artifact name
        id: set-artifact-name
        run: echo "artifact-name=app-${{ github.sha }}.tar.gz" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Upload artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ steps.set-artifact-name.outputs.artifact-name }}
          path: |
            dist/
            build/
          retention-days: 7

  deploy-staging:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    environment: staging
    steps:
      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-name }}
          path: ./dist

      - name: Setup SSH
        uses: webfactory/ssh-agent@v0.8.0
        with:
          ssh-private-key: ${{ secrets.STAGING_SSH_KEY }}

      - name: Deploy to staging
        run: |
          ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${{ secrets.STAGING_USER }}@${{ secrets.STAGING_HOST }} << 'EOF'
            cd /var/www/staging
            tar -xzf ./dist/*.tar.gz
            npm run deploy:staging
          EOF

  deploy-production:
    needs: [build, deploy-staging]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    environment: production
    steps:
      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-name }}
          path: ./dist

      - name: Setup SSH
        uses: webfactory/ssh-agent@v0.8.0
        with:
          ssh-private-key: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY }}

      - name: Deploy to production
        run: |
          ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_USER }}@${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_HOST }} << 'EOF'
            cd /var/www/production
            tar -xzf ./dist/*.tar.gz
            npm run deploy:production
          EOF
